positive: A whimsical, stylized silhouette of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) standing on a crescent moon. The fox should be highly detailed with expressive, dynamic pose and glowing, ethereal tails. Surrounding the fox are clusters of stylized stars, scattered planets, and blooming astral florals in deep indigo and violet hues. Use a strong, high-contrast, two-tone linework style with negative space pop. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered for optimal apparel printing. Art Nouveau meets modern tattoo flash aesthetic. Studio quality, highly intricate detail, crisp linework, graphic novel quality.
